title: P0-04 Guardrail Validation
disclaimer: research tool only — no auto trading — no precision prediction claim — no DB write — no external API — no LLM call — no strategy mutation — no regime logic mutation — no performance claim — no edge claim

noDBWrite.note: All changes are read-only query modifications

noStrategyMutation.note: Regime thresholds and scoring weights unchanged

noRegimeLogicMutation.note: detectRegime() judgment logic not modified, only date gate added

noPerformanceClaim.note: No ROI / win_rate / profit fields added

noEdgeClaim.note: No edge / outperform / guaranteed terms in new fields

noBuySellSignal.note: No buy/sell/signal/recommendation fields in new output

noH001H012.note: No H001-H012 hypothesis references in new fields

backwardCompatibility.note: asOf is optional — all callers without asOf unchanged
